title: S + make/let/have + O + V原形（使役動詞）

formulas.zh: 使役動詞後接受詞加原形動詞，表強迫、允許或委託

formulas.formula: be made + to V（make的被動式）
formulas.zh: make被動時需改為to V，其他兩個動詞被動式仍為原形V

explanation: 使役動詞用於表示讓他人執行某動作。make表強迫或致使（帶有強制性），let表允許或准許（表自由），have表委託或吩咐（較正式）。三者後均接原形動詞。注意：make改為被動式時必須加to成為be made to V，但let和have的被動式仍保持原形。此為學測常考重點，易與被動語態混淆。

examples.eng: The teacher made the students rewrite their essays more carefully.
examples.chi: 老師強迫學生更仔細地重寫他們的文章。

examples.eng: Her parents let her attend the concert last weekend.
examples.chi: 她的父母允許她上周末參加音樂會。

examples.eng: I had my mechanic repair my car before the trip.
examples.chi: 我委託機修工在出遊前修理我的車。

examples.eng: The strict coach was made to apologize for his harsh words to the team.
examples.chi: 那位嚴格的教練被迫為對球隊的刺耳言語道歉。

extension.tip: make被動時必須加to，是最常見錯誤。記住：主動make → 被動be made to。其他動詞let和have的被動式仍保持原形。判斷時先看使役動詞，再觀察後面動詞形式，確認是否為被動語態以決定是否加to。

examples.test: The general made the soldiers advance.
examples.result: → 主動：make + O + 原形V。被動改為：The soldiers were made to advance by the general.（必須加to）

examples.test: Let him go home early today.
examples.result: → let表允許，被動式為：He was let go home early.（保持原形，不加to）

examples.test: I have the worker paint the fence.
examples.result: → have表委託，被動式為：The fence was had painted.（較少用被動，但保持原形）

extension.note: Make被動加to，Let和Have被動保原形；一個強迫兩個溫和（Let自由，Have委託）。

parts: the players run ten laps every morning.
exercises.sentence: The coach has the players run ten laps every morning.
exercises.translation: 教練每天早上讓球員跑十圈。

parts: the prisoners work in the mines without rest.
exercises.sentence: The cruel king made the prisoners work in the mines without rest.
exercises.translation: 殘暴的國王強迫囚犯在礦場不停地工作。

parts: her stay out past midnight on weekends.
exercises.sentence: Her mother lets her stay out past midnight on weekends.
exercises.translation: 她的母親允許她在週末過午夜後才回家。

parts: provide better working conditions for all employees.
exercises.sentence: The company was made to provide better working conditions for all employees.
exercises.translation: 該公司被迫為所有員工提供更好的工作條件。

vocab_table.zh: 主詞與受詞間的指使關係

mc_exercises.question_chi: 老師讓學生重新檢查他們的作業。選擇最適當的使役動詞形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher _______ the students check their homework again.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C「had」。此句表示老師吩咐/要求學生檢查作業，具有正式的委託意味，應用have。A的make表強迫，語氣過強；B的let表允許，不符合老師主動要求的語義；D的have為現在式，時態不符（句子使用過去式）。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 母親允許孩子參加派對。選擇正確的使役動詞及時態。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The mother _______ her child attend the party last Saturday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「let」。此句強調母親「允許」孩子參加派對，表示給予自由/許可，should用let。雖然時態是過去，但let的過去式仍為let（不規則動詞）。B的make表強迫不符；C和D的have表委託吩咐不符原意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 經理強迫員工加班完成專案。選擇最適當的使役動詞形式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The manager _______ the employees work overtime to finish the project.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是C「made」。句子強調經理「強迫」員工加班，make表示強制或致使，最符合語境。A的let表允許不符；B的have表委託語氣較溫和；D為被動式且帶to（be made to），改變了主語，不符合此主動結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 被動語態：這名學生被迫重新寫論文。選擇正確的被動式使役動詞。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The student was _______ rewrite his essay because of the numerous errors.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「made to」。make改為被動式時必須加to變成be made to V，表「被迫做某事」。B的let被動式不加to，應為「was let」（罕見）；C的had to為情態動詞短語，非被動使役結構；D缺少to，被動式make後必須接to才完整。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師讓學生們在課堂上練習英文對話。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher let the students practice English conversation in class.
hints: 提示1：let表示『允許』，後接原形動詞，不需加to
提示2：常見錯誤是讓動詞加-s或加-ing，記住原形即可

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 父母親強迫他每晚做兩小時的功課。
translation_exercises.answer: His parents made him do two hours of homework every night.
hints: 提示1：make表示『強迫』，後接原形動詞，注意時態變化（made是過去式）
提示2：不要寫成『make him to do』，make後絕對不加to（被動式除外）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 經理讓員工在週末加班，導致他們感到疲憊。
translation_exercises.answer: The manager had the employees work overtime on weekends, which made them feel exhausted.
hints: 提示1：have表示『委託或吩咐』，正式用法，後接原形動詞；make可用於表示『導致』結果
提示2：『加班』用work overtime，不是『do overtime』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那位學生被老師強迫寫了一份兩千字的反思報告，因為他在考試中作弊。
translation_exercises.answer: The student was made to write a two-thousand-word reflection report by his teacher because he cheated on the exam.
key_points: be made to V（被動式加to）
hints: 提示1：make的被動式必須改為『be made + to V』，這是唯一需要加to的被動式用法
提示2：注意『作弊』用cheat on the exam，『反思報告』用reflection report；被動式時要加to是本題核心考點
